name: Muntenia
summary: Southern ethnographic region with strong fair culture, ritual songs, and varied local attire.

games.name: Geamparale
games.description: Fast paired dance style performed at weddings and community events.

costumes.name: Ie cu fota
costumes.description: Traditional blouse matched with wrapped woven skirt and decorated belt.

traditions.name: Dragobete
traditions.description: Spring-associated social custom linked to courtship and seasonal renewal.
